landing.headline: Will AI Replace
landing.subheadline: Get your personalized Disruption Risk Score in 3 minutes. Based on real market data, AI advancement trends, and your unique skill profile.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to understand your career's future and build a defense strategy
landing.step1Desc: Share your CV or describe your role. Our AI analyzes your skills against 10,000+ job market data points.
landing.step2Desc: Receive a detailed breakdown of automation risk, AI replacement probability, and market demand trends for your role. We also show how your specific skills compare against others in the same field.
landing.step3Desc: Get a personalized 90-day action plan with specific skills to learn, certifications to pursue, and career pivots to consider.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: Real stories from professionals who took control of their career future
landing.pricingDesc: Get your risk score for free. Unlock the full action plan, career roadmap, and AI training arena with a subscription.
landing.finalCta: Don't Wait Until It's Too Late
landing.finalCtaDesc: The workforce is changing faster than ever. Know where you stand and take control of your career future.
landing.statsJobsAtRisk: Of US jobs at high risk
landing.trustedBy: Trusted by professionals across the Nordics & Baltics
landing.testimonial1Text: This tool helped me realize I needed to learn cloud skills urgently. I followed the 30-day plan and landed a DevOps role within 2 months. The risk score was a real wake-up call.
landing.testimonial2Text: As a marketing manager, I wasn't sure how AI would affect my role. The assessment showed me exactly which skills to strengthen. Now I feel much more confident about my future.
landing.testimonial3Text: I was considering a career switch to data analytics. The stress test and negotiation tools prepared me better than any course. Got a 25% salary increase in my new role!

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready for full career tools.
pricing.faqFreeDesc: You get a career risk assessment, blockers analysis, a teaser action plan (first 3 days), and 3 Job X-Ray analyses per month. No credit card required.
pricing.faqStarterDesc: Starter ($7.99/mo) gives you the full 30-day roadmap with tasks, task tracking and progress, session history, shareable reports, progress analytics, email reminders, and 3 Job X-Ray analyses per month.
pricing.faqProDesc: Pro ($15.99/mo) includes everything in Starter plus 8 AI-powered Arena tools: Interview Simulator, Salary Coach, CV Optimizer, AI Career Mentor, Company-Specific Prep, LinkedIn Summary Generator, Cover Letter Generator, Salary Benchmark Dashboard, plus interview score tracking, PDF export, and unlimited Job X-Ray.
pricing.faqCancelDesc: Yes! Cancel anytime from your Stripe billing portal. You'll keep access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faqBillingDesc: Subscriptions are billed via Stripe. Choose monthly or annual billing. Annual plans save you 2 months compared to monthly.
pricing.faqAnnualDesc: Annual plans are billed once per year at a discounted rate. Starter is $79.90/year ($6.66/mo) and Pro is $159.90/year ($13.33/mo) — saving you 2 months each year.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or need support? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.responseTimeDesc: Usually within 24 hours on business days
contact.successDesc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

dashboard.headline: One flow: from profile to roadmap
dashboard.headlineDesc: Create a future-readiness overview, answer questions, and unlock a roadmap on the same page.
dashboard.liveNote: Overview updates as you learn, interview, or upload a new CV.
dashboard.overviewDesc: Start with your profile, answer short questions, view analysis, and lock a roadmap for 7/30/90 days.
dashboard.currentReadinessDesc: Overview of your current score and baseline.
dashboard.addCvCalc: Add CV and answers to calculate score
dashboard.addCvPlaceholder: Add CV and answer questions to calculate readiness overview and analysis.
dashboard.explorePositions: Explore positions or move forward if the overview looks right.
dashboard.allStepsNote: All steps happen on the same page. Stay focused and keep moving.
dashboard.q1: How do you approach a new technical challenge?
dashboard.q1Placeholder: Briefly describe your steps and metrics.
dashboard.q2: What keeps your learning pace going?
dashboard.q3: How do you collaborate when the schedule is tight?
dashboard.q3Placeholder: Give an example and the outcome.
dashboard.learningVelocityDesc: How fast you pick things up
dashboard.strongSignalsDesc: Workshop facilitation, architecture reviews, and rapid prototyping are your current strengths.
dashboard.developmentFocusDesc: Deepen measurement, model evaluation, and prompt chaining to unlock next-level positions.
dashboard.momentumDesc: Every interview adds a signal; keep the rhythm so your readiness stays ahead of market changes.
dashboard.noPivotRolesDesc: Upload a CV, run a job match, or complete a mock interview to see high-overlap positions.
dashboard.overlapsNote: We'll add overlaps when more data is available.
dashboard.noGaps: No clear gaps identified at the moment.
dashboard.miniRoadmapNote: Turn these gaps into a concrete mini roadmap.
dashboard.growthAreasTitle: What to improve in the next 30 days
dashboard.visibilityDesc: Choose how interviewers find you when your match exceeds their threshold.
dashboard.minMatch: Minimum match to show your profile
dashboard.thresholdDesc: Show profile when recruiter role match exceeds this threshold.
dashboard.confirmOverviewDesc: Use "Create overview" to refresh scores when you upload a CV or complete an interview.
dashboard.choosePivotDesc: Generate a mini roadmap for the position with the smallest gaps to maintain momentum.
dashboard.stayDiscoverableDesc: Tune visibility so interviewers can see you when their role matches your fit.
dashboard.uploadCvPlaceholder: Upload a CV or complete a mock interview to populate the future-readiness overview and pivot roles.
dashboard.readinessNote: Future-readiness considers CV, interview signals, and recent learning.
